form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes here off a 32-day let-up. Most recently held ground to the line 3rd of 9 at Tauranga on March 14 over 1400m, on a wet track; 2 len behind Morning Cocoa with 58.5kg at $1.90. The start before that 2nd of 12 at Pukekohe on February 25 over 1200m, slow going 0.5 len behind Sweet Smile carrying 56.5kg at $5. Looks all set to run well again.
